title: Sprint-K H13: Schema-Validation-Gate + Auto-Pickup Silent-Fail-Detection + Config-in-Git-Path
description:
Agent-Role-Declaration: Operator (pieter_pan) -> Forge (sre-expert)

Handoff: Analyse → Umsetzung
Scope: Sprint-K H13 — 3 new rules R51+R52+R53 als Defense-Layer gegen silent Config/Subprocess-Failures. Motivation: heute-morgen-incident 2026-04-20 06:00-06:34 UTC — 25 min Production-Outage weil openclaw.json schema-invalid + Auto-Pickup subprocess silent-crashed ohne Detection.

Done: H1/H6/H7/H11 sauber, H3/H8 config-fixes live; openclaw.json recovered via surgical patch; morning-recovery-report deployed; R51+R52+R53 candidates dokumentiert.

Open: 3 konkrete Defense-Layer implementieren:

Layer R51 (Schema-Validation-Gate): nach JEDEM Write auf openclaw.json muss automatisch openclaw doctor laufen; bei Config invalid → automatic rollback auf .bak-file + Discord-alert. Heute morgen hätte das 25 min Outage auf <10s reduziert.

Layer R52 (Auto-Pickup Silent-Fail-Detection): trigger_worker() in auto-pickup.py muss subprocess-Exit-Code binnen 5-10s nach Popen pruefen. Wenn Exit != 0 → lock-file entfernen + Discord-alert + kein triggered=1 im log. Heute morgen: 3 Cycles zeigten triggered=1 obwohl subprocess mit Config-Invalid sofort starb.

Layer R53 (Config-in-Git-Track-Path): /home/piet/.openclaw/openclaw.json und /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/*.py sind aktuell OUTSIDE aller Git-Repos. Atlas/Forge-Writes können bei Crash verloren gehen. Minimal-Fix: täglicher Backup-Cron zu vault/03-Agents/openclaw-config-backups/YYYY-MM-DD/ — ohne neues dediziertes Repo.

State-Snapshot: Live-Case morning-recovery-report-2026-04-20.md dokumentiert Timeline + Root-Causes. R51-R53 Candidate-Definitionen bereits in rules.jsonl-Format vorhanden. MCP-Setup-Skeleton enthält bereits pre/post-hook skeletons (04-hooks/*.sh), können als Blueprint für R51+R52-Server-Side-Versions dienen.

Entschieden: Alle 3 Layer in einer Task statt 3 getrennt. Sie bilden eine konsistente Defense-Strategy. Layer-Priorität: R51 P0 (hätte heute-morgen-Outage komplett verhindert), R52 P0 (silent-failure pattern), R53 P1 (nicht-dringend aber sustainable).

Offen-Entschieden: Ob R53 als Cron-Backup (einfach) oder neues /home/piet/.openclaw/ als Git-Repo (invasiv). Forge-Empfehlung: Cron-Backup first, bei nächster Incident upgrade zu eigenem Repo.

Anti-Scope: Keine Änderung am openclaw-binary selbst (binary validation ist Anthropic-scope, wir sind am Wrapper-Level). Keine Abhängigkeit von externen Validation-Services. Keine Änderung an trigger_worker-Contract oder API.

Bootstrap-Hint: /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/auto-pickup.py (trigger_worker Funktion Zeile 223-255). /home/piet/.openclaw/openclaw.json aktuell gültig (post-recovery, MD5 verified). /home/piet/vault/03-Agents/mcp-setup-skeletons-2026-04-20/04-hooks/post-config-write-verify.sh enthält Blueprint-Logik für R51.

Prompt-Cache-Prefix-Token-Estimate: 573

Task ID: SPRINT-K-H13-SCHEMA-VALIDATION-GATE-SILENT-FAIL-CONFIG-BACKUP

Objective: Deploy 3 defense-layers (R51 schema-validation-gate, R52 auto-pickup silent-fail-detection, R53 config-in-git-track) als server-side governance-crons und in-script-checks, um heute-morgen-Outage-Pattern zu verhindern.

Implementation-Steps:

1. R51 Schema-Validation-Gate (~45 min):
   New file: /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/openclaw-config-guard.sh
   Logic: inotifywait auf /home/piet/.openclaw/openclaw.json → on IN_CLOSE_WRITE trigger: cp current to .bak-pre-guard-$timestamp, run openclaw doctor, if Config invalid: cp .bak-pre-guard back, Discord-alert CRITICAL.
   Alternative simpler approach: Cron-based every 60s: compare MD5 of openclaw.json with last-known-good; if changed, run doctor, if invalid rollback + alert. Wähle Cron-Variante (simpler, kein inotify-Dependency).
   Systemd-user-service ODER crontab entry: * * * * * /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/openclaw-config-guard.sh >> /tmp/config-guard.log 2>&1

2. R52 Auto-Pickup Silent-Fail-Detection (~45 min):
   Modify /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/auto-pickup.py trigger_worker() function:
   After subprocess.Popen(...), wait time.sleep(8), then proc.poll():
     if rc is None: proc is running, good
     if rc == 0: proc exited cleanly but instantly, WARN (unusual)
     if rc != 0: proc CRASHED, log TRIGGER_SILENT_FAIL with rc + last 5 lines of out_path, Discord-alert, remove lock-file, return False
   Keep existing success-path behavior intact.
   Log new field in CYCLE summary: silent_fails=N

3. R53 Config-in-Git-Track-Path (~30 min):
   New script: /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/config-snapshot-to-vault.sh
   Logic: daily 03:00 UTC cron, creates vault/03-Agents/openclaw-config-backups/YYYY-MM-DD/ directory, copies openclaw.json + scripts/*.py + crontab-dump into it, commits to vault-git-repo with auto-message.
   Retention: last 30 days (prune older).
   Crontab entry: 0 3 * * * /home/piet/.openclaw/scripts/config-snapshot-to-vault.sh >> /tmp/config-snapshot.log 2>&1

4. Rules Deployment (~20 min):
   Append R51+R52+R53 to /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/memory/rules.jsonl with full schema (id, title, category, status=active, since, rule, motivation with live-case from morning-recovery, fix, prevention, related_rules).
   Re-render to feedback_system_rules.md via existing rules-render.sh.
   Update /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/AGENTS.md with 3-section preamble for R51/R52/R53.

5. Verification (~15 min):
   Test R51: manually inject invalid key into openclaw.json, verify guard detects within 60s, rolls back, alerts.
   Test R52: manually spawn subprocess that exits 1 immediately from trigger_worker context, verify silent_fails=1 in next cycle log + Discord-alert sent.
   Test R53: trigger script manually, verify snapshot exists in vault.
   Remove test-pollution after each.

6. Report (~15 min):
   Write sprint-k-h13-defense-layers-report-2026-04-20.md in vault/03-Agents/:
     R51 architecture + code + test-evidence
     R52 architecture + code + test-evidence
     R53 architecture + code + test-evidence
     integration-demo: simulate heute-morgen-outage, verify R51 catches it in <10s

Definition of Done:

- openclaw-config-guard.sh deployed + executable + cron installed + tested with invalid-injection
- auto-pickup.py modified with 8s post-Popen poll + silent_fails counter + Discord-alert path (verified via git log + code-inspection)
- config-snapshot-to-vault.sh deployed + first manual run creates snapshot in vault
- R51+R52+R53 in rules.jsonl (verified via cat rules.jsonl | jq 'select(.id == "R51")' etc.)
- AGENTS.md updated with 3-section preamble (grep-verified)
- feedback_system_rules.md re-rendered
- All 3 verification tests pass (inline-verified)
- Report in Vault ls-verified + wc -l
- Git-commit dedicated für auto-pickup changes
- R35 done nur nach ls-verify + git log
- R45 receipt=accepted within 60s, progress pro Layer, result final
- R49 alle claims inline-verified
